sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85651" key="ponhrokrati/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πονηρο-κρᾰτία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85651.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">government by the</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πονηροί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0081.tlg001:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl></cit>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0081.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
